name: Boru Lai
summary: Technology operations / project management professional with 4+ years of international experience spanning shipping, FinTech, IoT, and e-commerce. Proven track record in programme governance, vendor management, budget tracking, and cross-functional stakeholder coordination at global organisations including Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC. Microsoft Power BI Certified (PL-300). Fluent in English, German, Chinese, and Cantonese. Based in Germany, available immediately.
skills: Technology operations & tech stack lifecycle management

experience.title: Working Student in Project Coordination Customer Experience
bullets: Technology Operations Support: Coordinated cross-functional deliverables and managed operational dependencies across agile sprints; served as central coordination point between project teams, stakeholders, and product owners.
KPI & Performance Reporting: Analysed customer journey and user research data; translated findings into structured executive sprint review reports escalated to senior stakeholders.
Governance & Documentation: Maintained and consolidated internal booking reports; provided ad-hoc documentation support including presentation preparation and meeting facilitation.
Stakeholder & Agile Delivery: Participated in sprint ceremonies (planning, stand-ups, retrospectives); coordinated internal communications for feature releases and product publications.

experience.company: Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited (HSBC)
experience.title: Project Management Officer (PMO) — Platform Strategy Dept.
bullets: Budget & Financial Governance: Owned financial performance tracking across a USD 8M digital transformation programme; built multi-dimensional budget variance dashboards and weekly burn-rate reports escalated to C-suite.

Technology Programme Coordination: Served as central operational interface across Product, Engineering, Marketing, and C-suite; managed programme status, risk escalation, and prioritisation decisions across 6 workstreams.
Stakeholder Data Storytelling: Translated complex programme data into structured insight narratives that drove investment and prioritisation decisions at executive reviews.
Hybrid Events & Internal Comms: Planned and delivered hybrid town hall events for 300+ attendees; managed run-of-show, speaker coordination, produced company-wide commercial video/newsletters.

experience.title: Working Student in Business Development
bullets: Market & Competitive Intelligence: Conducted competitive analysis and market sizing across automotive and furniture retail segments; packaged findings into executive-ready reports supporting strategic channel prioritisation decisions.

Project Reporting & Optimisation: Regularly updated project data to monitor progress and drafted periodic progress reports; optimised project-related spreadsheets to enhance automation and improve operational efficiency.
Vendor & Stakeholder Coordination: Managed scheduling and logistics coordination for client visits and cross-team meetings within the AC Asia Business department.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
bullets: Go-to-Market & Campaign Operations: Developed and executed B2B GTM strategy across 4 product launches; event activations and sales collateral contributed to 4.6M CNY in signed contracts.
Vendor & Partner Management: Managed external vendors and channel partners; developed SOPs and training materials standardising GTM delivery processes across the organisation.

Performance Analytics & Reporting: Tracked and reported marketing KPIs across campaigns; ROI analysis evidenced direct event-to-revenue impact; built recurring competitor monitoring reports informing product positioning.

experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Go-To-Market Strategy & Product Operations: Defined and executed go-to-market plans across 6 product lines; aligned Marketing, Sales, and Engineering on launch timelines, positioning, and channel strategy.
Trade Fair & Client Engagement: Delivered product demonstrations and pre-sales support to 100+ B2B clients at industry trade fairs; coordinated lead capture supporting the sales pipeline.
Portfolio Gap Analysis: Identified portfolio gaps across product lines; coordinated with engineering and sales teams to define development priorities and address unmet customer needs.

experience.title: Marketing Specialist
bullets: Large-Scale Event Operations: Planned and delivered corporate live-stream events for 4,000+ attendees; oversaw venue management, vendor negotiation, run-of-show, digital production, and live-event logistics end-to-end.

KOL & Partnership Coordination: Managed KOL and corporate partner relationships; curated influencer participation across digital and live-event channels maximising audience engagement and brand reach.

ROI & Audience Analytics: Analysed post-event operational and audience data; delivered structured insight reports to senior management improving targeting and format decisions for subsequent campaigns.
KPI Framework Design: Developed an impact measurement framework and cost-benefit tracking methodology for sustainability projects; presented findings and recommendations to club management.
Data-Driven Post-Event Evaluation: Delivered structured analysis enabling evidence-based post-event evaluation across the club's sustainability programme.
